code:
stateDiagram state "This is a state description of HR600 Workflow" as s2 [Education_ClassroomService] --> Login Login --> if_backupData if_backupData --> StartWorkflow: false if_backupData --> is_networkAvailable : true is_networkAvailable --> BackupToNetwork: true Note right of BackupToNetwork: There is still unsaved production data in the backup directory.
Do you want to transfer the data to the network drive now? is_networkAvailable --> RemainingBackup: false Note right of RemainingBackup: There is production data in the backup directory that has not yet been backed up.
The network drive for backing up the data is not available.
The data cannot be transferred. StartWorkflow --> FinishWorkflow FinishWorkflow --> [Education_LMS_Portal] StartWorkflow --> MesDataToNetwork MesDataToNetwork --> StartWorkflow MesDataToNetwork --> Crash Note right of Crash: The transfer of the packed production data export file failed.
The data will be saved to a local backup directory.
Please make sure that the network drive is available and access is granted.
You can move the cached data to the network drive again the next time you start HRSoft2. Note right of Crash: The backup of the packed production data export file to the backup directory failed.
Please make sure that the backup directory is available and access is granted.
You may find the production data unpacked on the temporary directory TempArchiveFiles.
You can also initiate a manual export from the HRSoft2 archives.
If the problem persists, please contact Ersa service. Note right of Crash: An error occurred while generating the zip file of the production data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while generating the CSV data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just created.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while querying the database for the last entry.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. MesDataToNetwork --> FinishWorkflow [Education_ClassroomService] Crash --> FinishWorkflow Crash --> Backup [Education_StudentDB]
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HR600工作流设计一个状态图，核心场景是从教室服务登录后，根据是否备份数据来分支流程。如果不需要备份就直接进入StartWorkflow，需要备份的话要先检查网络可用性。
明白了。那网络可用的情况走BackupToNetwork分支，不可用的话走RemainingBackup？这两个状态需要加备注说明吗？
对，BackupToNetwork要提示用户还有未保存的生产数据在备份目录，询问是否立即传输到网络驱动器。RemainingBackup则需要说明网络不可用，数据无法传输，生产数据尚未备份。
好的，主干流程我画好了：StartWorkflow之后到FinishWorkflow，然后指向Education_LMS_Portal。另外我发现StartWorkflow还有一个分支到MesDataToNetwork，这个需要循环回来吗？
是的，MesDataToNetwork要能循环回StartWorkflow，但同时它也可能导致Crash异常。Crash这个状态比较复杂，需要多个备注说明不同的错误场景——包括CSV生成错误、数据库查询错误、ZIP文件生成错误，还有传输失败和备份目录失败的情况。
Crash的备注我注意到有五个不同的错误说明，其中三个放在右侧，两个放在左侧。另外Crash之后应该能走到FinishWorkflow，还能走到Backup状态对吧？还有Education_StudentDB这个节点需要连接吗？
等等，Education_StudentDB应该是独立的一个节点，不需要从Crash连过去。另外MesDataToNetwork在正常完成时也应该能直接走到FinishWorkflow。Crash到Backup的连线是对的，让用户可以手动触发备份。
已调整：Education_StudentDB作为独立节点存在，MesDataToNetwork增加指向FinishWorkflow的分支，Crash保留到FinishWorkflow和Backup的连线。整个图还需要一个总标题，用"This is a state description of HR600 Workflow"放在顶部可以吗？
可以，这样结构就完整了。再检查一下：Login后的if_backupData判断、网络可用性的分支、MesDataToNetwork的循环和异常处理、Crash的多场景备注，都没问题就可以定稿了。
